session_hooks.name: kast-bootstrap
session_hooks.description: Resolve the kast CLI binary once per session, caching KAST and SKILL_ROOT into session state and exporting KAST_CLI_PATH.

session_hooks.name: agents
session_hooks.description: Refresh affected agents.md file at the end of each session to keep it up to date with the latest changes and diagnostics.

completion_hooks.name: kast-diagnostics-gate
completion_hooks.description: Run kast diagnostics on all modified Kotlin files before ending work.

completion_hooks.name: build-health-gate
completion_hooks.description: Run the project-defined highest-signal Gradle validation task before ending work.

completion_hooks.name: test-gate
completion_hooks.description: Run the full test task for the project before ending work.

completion_hooks.name: docs-writer-gate
completion_hooks.description: Invoke docs-writer when documentation-related or Kotlin files are changed.

pre_edit_hooks.name: kast-impact-gate
pre_edit_hooks.description: Run kast impact analysis before editing Kotlin symbols to understand downstream effects.
